description: Typing burst (~1.5s of keys) — keyboard / code typing reveal, text-being-typed beat. Start as the text begins typing.
Crisp UI click — button press, toggle, selection. Short accent, sync exactly to the on-screen action.
Short whoosh — quick swipe/slide accent, fast element move, snappy transition. Sync to the motion.
Quick pop — element appear/spawn, chip/tag/badge in. Small precise accent, sync to the pop-in.
Bass impact hit — logo/hero snap, headline slam. Trigger on the visual landing; decay carries into the next shot (J-cut).
Bright sparkle / shimmer — magical reveal or 'shine' highlight on a hero element. Sync to the highlight.
